title: Fresh Polish Kidney Beans Soup
description: A light, comforting soup featuring tender kidney beans, fresh vegetables, and aromatic herbs for a low‑calorie Polish twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat and sauté the diced onion, carrot, and celery until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant, stirring constantly to avoid burning.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes to develop its flavor.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a gentle boil.
Add the cooked kidney beans, chopped dill, and parsley. Reduce heat to maintain a steady simmer and let the soup cook for 20 minutes to meld the flavors.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then stir in the fresh lemon juice for a bright finish.
Remove the pot from heat and let the soup sit for 5 minutes before serving to allow the herbs to infuse.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of extra fresh dill or parsley if desired.
